verification_gate: Evaluation identifies current weave state, usable message primitives, heartbeat support, integration gaps, and next safe task.
proof_summary: src/weave is a clean source repo with bus primitives, tracked ask/answer/ack, fan-out, jobs, notify/delivery, MCP tools, and heartbeat design. The installed Yazelix frontdoor is present and resolves to the active runtime, but neither the clean pack prefix nor plain `yzx run` expose a `weave` command or a Rust `cargo` frontdoor, so live runtime adoption remains blocked until an owned clean frontdoor exists.

live_commands.command: env -i HOME=/home/flexnetos USER=flexnetos LOGNAME=flexnetos PATH=/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/usr/bin:/home/flexnetos/.local/bin:/home/flexnetos/.nix-profile/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin:/usr/bin:/bin bash --noprofile --norc -c 'set -eu; for c in weave envctl git-kb codex cargo; do if p=$(command -v "$c" 2>/dev/null); then printf "%s=%s\n" "$c" "$p"; else printf "%s=NOT_FOUND\n" "$c"; fi; done'
env -i HOME=/home/flexnetos USER=flexnetos LOGNAME=flexnetos PATH=/home/flexnetos/.nix-profile/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin:/usr/bin:/bin yzx inspect
live_commands.output_summary: yzx reports Runtime /nix/store/dpp8f11dbpfgfxdb0c0k535vcxidgcyy-yazelix-flexnetos-foundation, Version v17.9, Variant mars.

live_commands.command: env -i HOME=/home/flexnetos USER=flexnetos LOGNAME=flexnetos PATH=/home/flexnetos/.nix-profile/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin:/usr/bin:/bin yzx run bash -lc 'for c in cargo rustc bun bunx felix kache wild-linker weave; do if p=$(command -v "$c" 2>/dev/null); then printf "%s=%s\n" "$c" "$p"; else printf "%s=NOT_FOUND\n" "$c"; fi; done'

env -i HOME=/home/flexnetos USER=flexnetos LOGNAME=flexnetos PATH=/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/usr/bin:/home/flexnetos/.local/bin:/home/flexnetos/.nix-profile/bin:/run/current-system/sw/bin:/usr/bin:/bin bash --noprofile --norc -c 'set -eu; envctl catalog tables --repo-root /home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/src/envctl | sed -n "1,80p"'

source_evidence.meaning: CLI primitives for peers, sessions, send, inbox, tracked ask/answer/ack, ask-many, job board, rich presence, daemon, notify, delivery, inject, and MCP.
MCP tools for send, inbox, peers, ask, jobs, presence, notify, delivery, spawn, and kill.
Optional presence daemon, CLI and MCP exposure, 15 second heartbeat loop, 60 second cleanup, 30 second stale presence cutoff.
Store heartbeat, presence, eviction, and peer liveness interface.

blockers.description: Neither the clean pack PATH nor plain `yzx run` resolves weave.
blockers.impact: Blocks live runtime bus, MCP, doctor, peers, notify, delivery, and heartbeat smoke from the currently proven installed frontdoor.

blockers.description: Neither the clean pack PATH nor plain `yzx run` resolves cargo or rustc.
blockers.impact: Blocks clean-prefix source build proof and Rust-side runtime smoke from the currently proven installed frontdoor.

next_safe_task: Expose weave through an owned clean-prefix frontdoor or a documented Yazelix dev/runtime entrypoint that also surfaces cargo/rustc as intended, then run an isolated clean-env bus smoke and heartbeat proof while keeping Drive comments, Sheet task graph, and proof_records authoritative.
